item.title: Checking Wear After 9,000 Hours
item.description: We found the kind of wear that makes you stop and stare after 9,000 hours of farm use.

media:content.media:title: Checking Wear After 9,000 Hours
media:content.media:description: We found the kind of wear that makes you stop and stare after 9,000 hours of farm use.

item.title: Pickup Trouble in the Mud
item.description: A farm pickup runs into muddy conditions and a costly lesson comes fast. Real field work means dealing with weather, equipment, and repairs.

media:content.media:title: Pickup Trouble in the Mud
media:content.media:description: A farm pickup runs into muddy conditions and a costly lesson comes fast. Real field work means dealing with weather, equipment, and repairs.

item.title: First Pass Weed Control on Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms makes the first pass with Unverferth Manufacturing Inc. equipment and Brody Bahr, working to knock down weeds in the field.

media:content.media:title: First Pass Weed Control on Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms makes the first pass with Unverferth Manufacturing Inc. equipment and Brody Bahr, working to knock down weeds in the field.

item.title: Storm Damage Starts Small on the Farm
item.description: A small start can turn into bigger trouble fast during farm work. Larson Farms deals with storm damage and the need to act quickly.

media:content.media:title: Storm Damage Starts Small on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A small start can turn into bigger trouble fast during farm work. Larson Farms deals with storm damage and the need to act quickly.

item.title: A Quick Fix Turned Into a Long Day
item.description: A quick fix turned into one of those days on the farm, with equipment trouble turning routine work into a longer repair job.

media:content.media:title: A Quick Fix Turned Into a Long Day
media:content.media:description: A quick fix turned into one of those days on the farm, with equipment trouble turning routine work into a longer repair job.

item.title: Getting the Quad Tractor Moving Again
item.description: A look at the tough part of getting the quad tractor moving again on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Getting the Quad Tractor Moving Again
media:content.media:description: A look at the tough part of getting the quad tractor moving again on the farm.

item.title: Quick Fix Turns Into Muddy Field Work
item.description: A quick repair turned into a muddy job in the field, showing the kind of equipment trouble and cleanup farm crews handle during busy workdays.

media:content.media:title: Quick Fix Turns Into Muddy Field Work
media:content.media:description: A quick repair turned into a muddy job in the field, showing the kind of equipment trouble and cleanup farm crews handle during busy workdays.

item.title: A Little Chaos, A Little Progress on the Farm
item.description: A day of farm work with a little chaos and a little progress, the kind of day many in agriculture know well.

media:content.media:title: A Little Chaos, A Little Progress on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A day of farm work with a little chaos and a little progress, the kind of day many in agriculture know well.

item.title: D4 Winch Repair Comeback
item.description: A tough D4 winch put up a fight, but the repair comeback is the best part.

media:content.media:title: D4 Winch Repair Comeback
media:content.media:description: A tough D4 winch put up a fight, but the repair comeback is the best part.
